name: io.github.cyanheads/eia-energy-mcp-server
description: Browse and query the EIA API v2 — electricity, petroleum, natural gas, coal, forecasts via MCP.

environmentVariables.name: EIA_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Free API key from api.eia.gov. Required — all requests use this as the api_key query parameter.

environmentVariables.name: EIA_DATASET_TTL_SECONDS
environmentVariables.description: Per-table TTL for DataCanvas dataframes in seconds.

environmentVariables.name: EIA_DATAFRAME_DROP_ENABLED
environmentVariables.description: Set to 'true' to expose eia_dataframe_drop for manual canvas cleanup.

environmentVariables.name: CANVAS_PROVIDER_TYPE
environmentVariables.description: Set to 'duckdb' to enable DataCanvas spillover for large query result sets (Node.js only).

environmentVariables.name: MCP_LOG_LEVEL
environmentVariables.description: Sets the minimum log level for output (e.g., 'debug', 'info', 'warn').

environmentVariables.name: EIA_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Free API key from api.eia.gov. Required — all requests use this as the api_key query parameter.

environmentVariables.name: EIA_DATASET_TTL_SECONDS
environmentVariables.description: Per-table TTL for DataCanvas dataframes in seconds.

environmentVariables.name: EIA_DATAFRAME_DROP_ENABLED
environmentVariables.description: Set to 'true' to expose eia_dataframe_drop for manual canvas cleanup.

environmentVariables.name: CANVAS_PROVIDER_TYPE
environmentVariables.description: Set to 'duckdb' to enable DataCanvas spillover for large query result sets (Node.js only).

environmentVariables.name: MCP_HTTP_HOST
environmentVariables.description: The hostname for the HTTP server.

environmentVariables.name: MCP_HTTP_PORT
environmentVariables.description: The port to run the HTTP server on.

environmentVariables.name: MCP_HTTP_ENDPOINT_PATH
environmentVariables.description: The endpoint path for the MCP server.

environmentVariables.name: MCP_PUBLIC_URL
environmentVariables.description: Public origin override for deployments behind a TLS-terminating reverse proxy (e.g. https://mcp.example.com).

environmentVariables.name: MCP_LOG_LEVEL
environmentVariables.description: Sets the minimum log level for output (e.g., 'debug', 'info', 'warn').
